title: ICPE 2026 Annual Meeting
description: International Conference on Pharmacoepidemiology and Therapeutic Risk Management. AsPEN holds its annual face-to-face meeting in the days surrounding ICPE.

title: ICPE 2026 abstract submission deadline
description: Late-breaker deadlines typically open separately in July.

title: ISPE Asian Conference on Pharmacoepidemiology (ACPE) 2026
description: ISPE's biennial Asia-Pacific regional conference. Primary face-to-face venue for AsPEN members in Asia.

title: AsPEN quarterly teleconference (Q3 2026)
location: Zoom (link circulated by the Academic & Education office)
description: Standing AsPEN coordination call — brief site reports, ongoing-study updates, methodological discussion. Open to all members.
